title: Anthropic Investor in Talks to Fund New Lab Run By Two Stanford AI Professors
summary: One such startup is Noeri , a new AI lab founded by two Stanford computer science professors to help businesses customize AI models for their specific needs so they don’t need to buy models from Anthropic and major providers.
